claim_bullets.bullet_text: Game masters may limit purchases to cities like Lomar, Reide, or the black market, yet still sell at adventurer shops (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256).
Even high‑power items require sorcerers with high‑ancient; non‑sorcerers cannot command them, preventing excessive power (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256).
Items survive rust‑free, indicating permanent magic from ancient sorcerers (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256).
Tables may include extra entries such as required strength or other data (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256).
Sage with treasure appraisal can determine value and cost, including low‑ancient commands (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256).

source_record_text: Magical item list in Alecrast, trade price guidelines, appraisal rules, and city restrictions.
